title: Wire launchers to fleet AMI
description: Update Renode and heterogeneous EC2 fleet scripts to default to validated AMI ami-0764d1b512e22671f and remove redundant runtime installation/download steps. Leave ec2-claude.sh on base AL2023 because it uses the development EBS.
close_reason: Fleet launchers and AWS docs now use validated AMI ami-0764d1b512e22671f
